data:ink:io
  • Work
  • Lab
  • Teaching
  • Now
  • Contact

data:ink:io

  1. I did not set out to be a designer

  2. I was supposed to be an anthropologist

    Spending time in the field, studying tool use, and asking people what they call their mother's uncle.

  3. But I realized that I wanted to do more than just record. I wanted to create.

  • Identity

      • Experience Designer
      • Interaction Designer
      • Developer

      Raise a Mootopian

      Ever tickled a cow?

      View project
      • Lead Developer

      Beautiful People Doing Stupid Things

      Columbia made the smartest jacket in the world and submitted it to the stupidest cold. The Human Snowball. Snow Angel. Russian Dunk.

      View project
      • Interaction Designer
      • Experience Designer
      • Lead Developer

      Publix: At Season's Peak

      Publix's “At Season’s Peak” campaign educates consumers on maximizing value by purchasing fresh produce at its peak season, promoting a healthy and cost-effective diet.

      View project

    Recognition

    Outcomes

  • Product

    Proident id sit dolor sunt nisi voluptate. Dolore culpa consectetur Lorem ullamco. Consequat elit officia irure. Qui labore laborum eiusmod veniam in ea. Sit ullamco eu commodo et cillum nulla esse ea non dolore esse amet adipisicing quis.

      • Experience Design Lead

      A Trusted Advisor for Doctors and Caregivers

      IBM's CarePlex, developed with Boston Children’s Hospital, leverages Watson AI to enhance global healthcare by providing dynamic medical records, personalized care, and a secure space for medical collaboration.

      View project
      • Rich Internet Application Developer
      • Experience Designer

      Democratizing Access to Medical Expertise

      OPENPediatrics, developed by IBM and Children's Hospital Boston, is a transformative open-source platform enhancing global pediatric care by sharing best practices through multimedia and fostering a connected medical community.

      View project
      • Product Design Lead

      Enquos

      Revolutionizing health information management by transforming raw data into meaningful insights, empowering users to maximize health and connect with experts for proactive wellness.

      View project

    Recognition

    Outcomes

  • Experience

      • Interaction Designer
      • Lead Developer

      Rembrandt and His Pupils

      Bluecadet's interactive kiosk for the Getty Center's Rembrandt exhibition engaged visitors in distinguishing between the master's works and his students', enhancing appreciation through innovative, gesture-powered technology.

      View project
      • Lead Developer

      A Museum that Talks with its Visitors

      ICA Boston tackled limited display space by using technology to make its extensive art archives more accessible and foster community dialogue.

      View project
      • Lead Developer

      Improving Access to a National Memorial

      Bluecadet's interactive website for the Lincoln Memorial, commissioned by the National Park Service, offers an accessible and engaging virtual experience, blending thoughtful design with historical reverence.

      View project

    Recognition

    Outcomes

  • Social Good

      Outcomes

    I am passionate about building design culture in teams and organizations

    I am also a pathological tinkerer
